Split Paw Hide Gloves  
 


Slot: HANDS
AC: 4
DEX: +3 WIS: +2
WT: 2.0 Size: TINY
Class: ALL except NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Slot: HANDS
AC: 4
DEX: +3 WIS: +2
WT: 2.0 Size: TINY

splitpaw human
QuoteReply
# Mar 14 2003 at 8:46 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592256166642
33 posts
i was in the area and was hunting outside when a really high lvl druid was just sitting around, he ask me what lvl i was i sed 36 so he sed wanna go inside i told him i dont wanna die, he sed no prob (i am a half elf starting a human player)
so he took me in and pl me to almost 27 but also let me have all of the loots (super nice)so no when i start my human char i will have gloves,belt, tunic,mask,necklace and ane eye WOOT hehehe lvl 1 i will have fun with this gear.

5 pp for these

# Apr 22 2002 at 10:53 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362105680
2 posts
Once in Butcherblock. I was camping the Goblin Warriors and then someone auctioned these for 15pp. I convinced him to decrease the price to 5pp and then i bought these and the mask for 10pp.

#Anonymous, Posted: Jul 24 2001 at 4:59 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Ill buy these if u can ne a little flexible on the price. Sned me a tell on wulvaren taluvill razorfists or hendil.
Good Deal
QuoteReply
# Jul 15 2001 at 2:46 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361512842
6 posts
I can buy these for like 10pp. They are really quite good for poeple who need WIS and are around lvl 10-25. Usually, you can find better stuff at higher lvls. On second thought, you can ALWAYS find better stuff at higher lvls. Good for now, not so good later.
▲ Page top
RE: Good Deal
QuoteReply
# Jan 28 2003 at 7:24 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591783879081
287 posts
ya good deal i got a pair for free when i was a newbie and im still not going to change for the extra 2 or 3 wis +2 is great for the hand slot. At higher lvls sure you can get more stuff but you also need to drop about 250pp on ur lvl spells, get these and hold on tight.

RE: Good Deal
QuoteReply
# Sep 13 2001 at 11:10 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591758061644

Name something better that a druid can wear, that you can get below 40.

Good luck finding anything. Imbued Elven chain gauntlets is about it, and they run several Kpp

Scholar

These are nice little gloves for Druids or any wisdom casters for that matter. I am certain they are fairly common as I see quite a few people with them on Fennin Ro. This price is probably pretty accurate. I paid 25pp for them when I bought them.

May be common...

These may be common but they're still Very Good for Druid's in the hand slot! They add 2WIS and are cheap!

#Anonymous, Posted: May 06 2001 at 10:20 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) These things are WAY to common to be worth anything.
